title: Fees
doc_html:
§80.  Fees

The recorder may charge and collect such fees as are permitted or prescribed by law.

Acts 2005, No. 169, §6, eff. July 1, 2006; Acts 2005, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 13, §1, eff. Nov. 29, 2005.
